summary: The main sporting event today is the IPL 2026 match between Rajasthan Royals and Chennai Super Kings, scheduled to start at 14:00 UTC. The Sheffield Shield 2024-25 final appears to have concluded around March 30th, and the AFC U20 Asian Cup 2025 finished in March 2025. No live matches were found for the Chandigarh T20 or the AFC U20 Asian Cup for today's date.
